name: Unusual Machines, Inc.
summary: PART I Background of Unusual Machines Unusual Machines, Inc. (Unusual Machines or the Company) is a Nevada corporation organized in 2024 which is a successor to a Puerto Rican corporation organized in 2019. The Company is engaged in the commercial drone industry, with its principal place of business in Orlando, Florida. In September of 2025, the Company acquired Rotor Lab Pty. Ltd., an Australian company (Rotor Lab). Unusual Machines manufactures and sells drone components and drones across a di...
